---
name: Feature request
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: raliegh2
---

## Objective

Describe the user or business outcome.

## Scope

List the behavior included in this feature.

## Security and privacy considerations

Describe authorization, data handling, audit, and abuse-prevention requirements.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Functional requirements are defined
- [ ] Role and permission behavior is defined
- [ ] Tests are identified
- [ ] Staging validation steps are identified

## Branch name

Use: `feature/<short-name>`
